About Me

Architecting the Future

I am a passionate technologist dedicated to building premium software solutions. From conceptualizing UI/UX designs to deploying scalable AI-integrated architectures, I bridge the gap between complex engineering and elegant human experiences.

Full Stack Developer

Building scalable web applications from front to back.

AI Enthusiast

Integrating LLMs and intelligent agents into products.

UI/UX Designer

Crafting beautiful, intuitive, and premium interfaces.

SaaS Developer

Architecting multi-tenant platforms and SaaS solutions.

Automation Engineer

Streamlining enterprise workflows with smart automation.

Featured Work

Selected Projects

A showcase of enterprise software, AI solutions, and SaaS platforms I've architected and built.

ID Card Generator Pro

A professional Canva-like ID card generation software supporting bulk Excel import, visual editing, drag-and-drop design, direct printing, photo management, export, and enterprise licensing.

Core Features

Bulk CreateExcel ImportVisual EditorDirect PrintMultiple TemplatesQR CodeBarcodeLicensing System

Tech Stack

Next.jsElectronNode.jsMongoDB

KVCET Department ERP

A complete ERP platform for educational institutions with separate portals for HOD, Faculty, Students, Attendance, Circulars, Complaints, Reports, Analytics, and Administration.

Core Features

Multi-role LoginDashboardAttendanceStudent ManagementFaculty PortalReportsNotifications

Tech Stack

ReactNode.jsPostgreSQLExpress

SecureVision AI

AI-powered CCTV surveillance platform capable of integrating with multiple DVR/NVR brands for intelligent monitoring, event detection, alerts, and centralized security management.

Core Features

AI DetectionLive MonitoringAlert SystemMulti-NVR SupportFace DetectionVehicle DetectionAnalytics Dashboard

Tech Stack

PythonTensorFlowReactWebRTC

Restaurant Management System

Cloud-based restaurant management software with POS, Kitchen Display, QR Ordering, Inventory, Billing, Reports, and Customer Management.

Core Features

POS SystemQR OrderingInventory TrackingAnalyticsRole Management

Tech Stack

Next.jsTailwind CSSFirebaseStripe

Attendance Management System

RFID/UHF-based attendance platform with real-time parent notifications, analytics, automated reports, and student tracking.

Core Features

RFID IntegrationReal-time SMS/EmailAutomated ReportsAdmin Dashboard

Tech Stack

IoTNode.jsReactMongoDB

Business Websites Portfolio

A collection of high-performance, SEO-optimized business websites developed for various clients across different industries.

Core Features

SEO OptimizedResponsive DesignCMS IntegrationFast Loading

Tech Stack

Next.jsFramer MotionTailwind CSSSanity CMS
Career Journey

Professional Experience

My track record of building products and adding value to organizations.

Freelance Developer

2020 - Present

Self-Employed

Developing custom web applications, SaaS platforms, and enterprise solutions for global clients. Focused on scalable architectures and premium user experiences.

  • Delivered 15+ full-stack projects
  • Implemented custom AI integrations
  • Maintained 100% client satisfaction

AI Solution Builder

2022 - 2023

Tech Innovations Inc.

Architected AI-driven workflows and integrated Large Language Models into existing business processes to automate repetitive tasks.

  • Reduced manual processing by 40%
  • Built internal tools using Next.js & OpenAI
  • Optimized database queries

Software Developer

2021 - 2022

Startup Nexus

Core team member responsible for building the MVP of a B2B SaaS platform. Handled frontend architecture and backend API design.

  • Led frontend development with React
  • Designed RESTful APIs
  • Set up CI/CD pipelines
